unreleased_commits.author: JaredHatfield
unreleased_commits.message:
Enhance workflows and configuration files for improved automation and documentation

- Update dependabot configuration to include cooldown period
- Add timeout settings to various GitHub Actions workflows
- Introduce new rules for dependabot cooldown in zizmor configuration
- Refactor .gitignore to streamline ignored files and directories
- Create justfile for build and test commands
- Add missing .clip4llm and .gitignore files in docs directory
- Update LICENSE year to 2026
- Enhance _config.yml with callouts for better documentation
